title: I release debt fear and allow steady flow
subtitle: A three-minute release-and-allow for the loop of replaying balances and feeling defined by what you owe.
excerpt: A three-minute pair of energy statements for the debt-obsession loop. The constant replaying of balances, the feeling that the number defines who you are, the weight of owing. Use when debt thinking has taken over the day — not when reviewing the actual numbers to plan a repayment.
sourceNotes: Release / Allow structure: The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024), chapters 2 through 5. Theme adapted from Day 6 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025), "Stop obsessing over debt." The combination as a daytime reset is original to the homemade.education library.

practice.whenToUse: Use when debt thinking has taken hold of the day — replaying balances, calculating interest, the feeling of being defined by what you owe. Not when reviewing the numbers to make a repayment decision.

content.text: A three-minute pair of energy statements for the debt-obsession loop. The replaying of balances and interest, the feeling that the debt defines who you are, the weight of owing that runs underneath the day. Use it when the thinking has taken over — not when reviewing the actual numbers to plan a repayment.

attrs.quote: I am ready to release the fear that debt defines me and the loop of replaying what I owe. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow a steady flow of money that clears what I owe and the freedom that arrives with each payment. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.

content.text: Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
If the obsessive thinking is still running after this, tap first.
works directly on the loop of replaying balances. For checking a balance without the spiral,
I look at my balance from steady ground
is a short affirmation to say before you open the banking app.

The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024), chapters 2 through 5. The theme is adapted from Day 6 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The combination as a daytime reset is original to the homemade.education library.
